data.title: JPMorgan Boss Jamie Dimon Doubts Bitcoin's 21M Supply Cap Despite 5 Lines In Source Code Imposing The Hard Limit: 'You Guys All Believe That?'
data.description: Jamie Dimon, the CEO of JPMorgan Chase & Co.

data.title: Nvidia's New Free, Open Source AI Model Reportedly Outperforms OpenAI's GPT-4o, Anthropic's Claude 3.5 Sonnet
data.description: Nvidia quietly launched its new AI model, Nemotron-70B, which outperformed larger models in benchmark tests and is now available as open-source for developers to modify, highlighting the company's expanding influence in the AI software space.

data.title: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk Slams Overregulation In Space Travel As He Campaigns For Trump: 'If Starship Did Hit A Whale, Honestly, It's Like The Whale Had It Coming'
data.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk on Sunday mocked what he termed as "overregulation" in the field of space travel on Sunday as he campaigned in Pennsylvania for former President Donald Trump.

data.title: TikTok Parent Fires Intern For 'Maliciously Interfering' With AI Training, Denies $10M Damage Claims Amid Social Media Outcry
data.description: Chinese tech giant ByteDance has dismissed an intern for allegedly disrupting the training of one of its artificial intelligence models.

data.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Vitalik Buterin Says 'Baptisms Of Fire' In Cryptocurrency Will Catalyze Growth For Bitcoin And Other Digital Assets
data.description: In a recent conference held in Singapore, Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of the Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) blockchain, expressed his positive outlook on the future of cryptocurrencies, despite recent industry challenges.
